rationale: The citing paper references Chan, Padmanabhan, and Seetharaman (2007) only once in the related-literature discussion as an example of prior gasoline work on pricing and location. The citation is grouped with several other studies and is used for broad positioning rather than for deriving hypotheses, model assumptions, estimation steps, or interpretation of results. The core framework and empirical implementation in the citing paper are instead tied to search-cost models (e.g., Burdett and Judd; Hong and Shum; Wildenbeest), with no distinct functional dependence on the 2007 paper.
